title: Iran Sends Trump Gift, New Petrol Penalties, NASA's Controversial New Nuclear Moon Plans | 10 News+
description: A Sydney Bowling club has come under the microscope after putting up a tribute for Australia's disgraced war hero Ben Roberts-Smith.  From rising petrol prices to delivery disruptions, this controversial solution from One Nation has everyone talking.  Iran has declared ships can pass through the Strait of Hormuz, but only under strict new conditions set by Tehran, marking a major shift in global shipping tensions.  NASA's brand new plan to put astronauts on the moon and keep them there prompts the 'colony question', with experts questioning if pregnancy can even survive life off Earth.
